# Phoenix DB Migration

## Goal
Migrate from PostgreSQL 12 to 16 with zero downtime.

- Test rollback procedure
- Schedule maintenance window with SRE

## Log
### 2026-03-18
- Set up pglogical on staging
- Initial sync took 45 minutes for 200GB

### 2026-03-20
